business_ideas.idea: The Milk Road: crypto-focused newsletter with creator portfolio transparency and authentic voice
AI newsletter copycat businesses: risky zero-to-one model in saturated space with bad unit economics
Morning Brew: 70-90M revenue newsletter with 250+ employees proving newsletter durability
smallboy.co: email newsletter on philosophy and decision-making, 100k subscribers in 6 months

predictions.text: Newsletter businesses easy zero-to-one but hard one-to-end without unique audience quality
Most AI newsletter creators will fail in 18 months when novelty and sponsorship fades
